title: PinkCPVP
description: This PvP texture pack aims to provide a cleaner look and a smoother gameplay experience during fights. With optimized textures, short swords, and bright colors, it helps improve visibility and makes PvP feel quicker and more responsive.
body:
- Pink Crystal PvP Pack 💗

A clean, optimized pink-themed Crystal PvP pack designed for smoother fights, better visibility, and a stylish competitive look. Built specifically for Crystal PvP players, this pack removes distracting visuals and replaces key textures with polished pink custom designs to keep your gameplay clear and consistent.

 Features ✨
 💥 Removed explosion particles for cleaner fights
 ⚓ Custom pink Respawn Anchors
 🔮 Cleaner End Crystal textures
 ✨ Pink Glowstone
 🟣 Pink Ender Pearls
 🪨 Clean stone textures
 🧸 Small Totem Pops for less visual clutter
 📦 Small Items for cleaner inventory and PvP visibility
 🎀 Smooth pink aesthetic throughout the pack
 ⚡ Optimized for Crystal PvP visibility and performance

Perfect for players who want a cute but competitive PvP experience while keeping battles clean, stylish, and easy to follow.
